payload.title: Remove stale MCP references from docs + Homebrew formula
payload.description: The Scope MCP server was deleted long ago but stale references remain. Fix: Formula/scope.rb desc (drop "+ MCP" — it falsely advertises a feature we do not ship); README.md line ~104 (rephrase the "No MCP server" sentence to not mention MCP); skills/README.md heading "## No MCP server required". Leave App/ xcodebuildmcp references alone — those are the third-party xcodebuild build tool, not a Scope MCP. Note: epic SCP-17 (MCP integration, done) stays as history.
